title: aira koenigii
intro: Aira koenigii, also known as curry leaf or sweet neem, is a tropical plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, green, and aromatic leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Aira koenigii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and enhancing the immune system, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Aira koenigii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and supplements, and can also be used as a spice in cooking, particularly in Indian and Southeast Asian cuisine.
